The warhead for the System-300/Aldan missile was about two meters long and 80 to 100 certimeters in diameter. Warheads for the System-75 [SA-2] missile had approximately 100 grey cassettes, 30 x 7 centimeters, each of which heid about 200 to 300 metal balls, each no more than 1.5 centimeters in diameter.
